verses.text: There is now therefore no condemnation to them that are in Christ Jesus.
For the law of the spirit of life, in Christ Jesus, hath delivered me from the law of sin and of death.
For they that are according to the flesh, mind the things that are of the flesh; but they that are according to the spirit, mind the things that are of the spirit.
For whosoever are led by the Spirit of God, they are the sons of God.
You have received the spirit of adoption of sons, whereby we cry: Abba (Father).
And we know that to them that love God, all things work together unto good.
If God be for us, who is against us?
Neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities, nor powers, nor things present, nor things to come, nor might.
Nor height, nor depth, nor any other creature, shall be able to separate us from the love of God, which is in Christ Jesus our Lord.
